name: Big Adventure: Trip to Europe 2 - Collector's Edition
short_description: Explore Europe without leaving home! Visit Bruges, Lisbon, and the Pena Palace. Relaxing object hunting and puzzles await you!
detailed_description:
Discover Europe Without Leaving Your Home!

Get ready for an unforgettable journey! You'll visit 30 vibrant and lively corners of Europe, where every step is a new discovery. Soak up the atmosphere of the ancient streets of Bruges, marvel at the grandeur of the Pena Palace in Portugal, and take a ride on the famous tram in Lisbon—all in one game!

Kick back, relax, and immerse yourself in searching for hidden objects, solving puzzles, and enjoying the beauty of meticulously detailed locations. This is your own personal virtual vacation!

No need to pack your bags! This game is your cozy way to explore Europe. Take a leisurely stroll along the cobblestones of Bruges, explore the halls of an ancient palace, and uncover all the hidden secrets. It's the perfect blend of relaxed object hunting and enjoyable brain teasers.

The Collector's Edition unlocks exclusive content:

  • Continue Your Journey: Explore 8 brand-new unique locations for even deeper immersion.

  • Challenge Yourself: Solve 8 additional mini-games that will test your wits.

  • Preserve the Memories: Receive a gift of exclusive wallpapers and the soundtrack to revisit your European fairytale again and again.

  • Complete Your Album: Collect a full set of unique stamps!

Perfect for those who love casual games, puzzles, and dream of traveling.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Russian
*languages with full audio support
